title: AVR I2C
description: AVR I2C documents i2c material for AVR in the hardware domain. It is classified as an operation page for the mcu-family class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Abbreviation, Master 모드, master -> slave, slave -> master, and 통신 오류, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include i2c, avr i2c, and hardware, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is hardware / avr / i2c / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
